## Submission type

- [ ] New OEM (humanoid robot maker)
- [ ] New supplier (component maker, tier-1, raw material)
- [ ] New supply relationship (link between existing companies)
- [ ] Update to existing data

## Company details (if adding a company)

- **Name**:
- **Type**: (oem / tier1_supplier / component_maker / raw_material / ai_compute)
- **Country**: (US, CN, JP, DE, CH, KR, TW, NL, IL, NO, AU, CA, GLOBAL)
- **Description**:
- **Website**:
- **Key products/specs**:

## Relationship details (if adding a relationship)

- **Supplier** (from):
- **Customer** (to):
- **Component supplied**:
- **Description**:

## Source

Link to an official announcement, press release, or credible report confirming this data.
